chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI S.C.R.A. No. 122 / 2014 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ HEARING CASE / PRIORITY. 1) For hearing of main case. 2) For hearing of CMA No. 708/2014. 23.05.2025. Mr. Tahir Khalil holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate for Applicant. Mr. Sajid Latif, Advocate for Respondent. ______________ Counsel holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar and requests for adjournment as he is busy before Hon’ble Supreme Court. At his request, adjourned. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/ 2 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 122 / 2014 _____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ HEARING CASE / PRIORITY 1) For hearing of main case. 2) For hearing of CMA No. 708/2014. 09.04.2021 Mr. Tahir Khalil Advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar Advocate for Applicant. ______________ Counsel holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar and requests for adjournment as he is unwell. Whereas, bailiff report reflects that notice could not be served upon the Respondent. Let notice be repeated upon the Respondent for the next date through first three modes. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
